title: Apps de 2015 vs Apps de 2026
setting: Split visual concept: left half cold blue desaturated 2015 aesthetic, right half dark premium 2026 with violet and coral accents, consistent split-screen camera framing, dramatic contrast lighting

scenes.prompt: Old cracked smartphone with basic ugly calorie counter app interface, dusty desk, harsh fluorescent lighting, desaturated colors, intentionally dated look, 9:16 vertical
scenes.voiceover: Asi se veian las apps de calorias en 2015.

scenes.prompt: Person tediously typing food name on old phone, bored expression, cold blue lighting, slow painful process, 9:16 vertical
scenes.voiceover: Buscar cada alimento. Scrollear cientos de resultados. Adivinar las porciones. Y rezar para que sea correcto.

scenes.prompt: Modern premium smartphone floating in dark space showing sleek AI nutrition app with violet glowing interface, holographic food scan, particles, futuristic, 9:16 vertical
scenes.voiceover: Y ahora estamos en 2026. Una foto. La IA hace todo.

scenes.prompt: Montage of futuristic app features: AI scanning, adaptive recommendations, weekly coach, dark premium with violet and coral accents, 9:16 vertical
scenes.voiceover: Coach IA que se adapta cada semana. Escaner de fotos en 3 segundos. Cinco modos de objetivo. Todo en una app.

scenes.prompt: Person confidently using modern dark nutrition app, satisfied smile, warm premium lighting with coral and violet, lifestyle shot, 9:16 vertical
scenes.voiceover: Deja de vivir en 2015. Pasa a Cals2Gains. Gratis 7 dias.
